The '''first planet''' of the [[Calline system/Legends|Calline system]] orbited so close to the primary, it was hazardously hot and uninhabitable. The world had a dense metal core, making it, in theory, suitable for mining with extensive precautions. Calline I was surveyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] searching for possible alternate bases around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].

{{Planet-stub}}
